channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Helpful Romantic Messages to Brighten Your Partner’s Day at Work
item.description: Dis article na guide wey show women how dem fit send sweet, funny, romantic, or even flirty messages to their men while dem dey work. E talk say work fit be stressful and sometimes people go dey overw...

item.title: DSWD Assures Uninterrupted Delivery of Key Social Services Under Four-Day Compressed Work Week
item.description: The Department of Social Welfare and Development (DSWD) has assured the public that its programs and services for vulnerable Filipinos will not be disrupted despite the shift to a four-day work week i...

item.title: B.C. Budget Receives Strong Public Criticism, Poll Shows Decline in NDP Support
item.description: A recent poll conducted by Innovative Research Group has revealed that British Columbia's latest provincial budget, released in February 2026 under Premier David Eby and the NDP government, is facing ...

item.title: Senate panel to investigate who benefited from recent fuel price increase
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Senate Standing Committee on Economic Affairs has decided to scrutinize the recent 20 percent hike in petroleum prices to determine whether the government gained revenue or private oil ...

item.title: Dodoma leaders promote women’s rights and gender equality during IWD
item.description: In Dodoma, the Regional Commissioner, Ms Rosemary Senyamule, expressed on Sunday that the government is firmly committed to empowering women and girls across different sectors to promote gender equali...

item.title: SIRT concludes no police wrongdoing in 2024 Fishing Lake First Nation death; suspect died by self-inflicted gunshot
item.description: The Saskatchewan Serious Incident Response Team (SIRT) released its final report on March 9, 2026, regarding a fatal incident that occurred in September 2024 on Fishing Lake First Nation. The investig...

item.title: Cebu Provincial Government Implements Four-Day Compressed Workweek for Energy Savings Amid Fuel Crisis
item.description: The provincial government of Cebu has officially adopted a four-day compressed workweek for its employees as part of efforts to conserve energy and reduce operational costs. Cebu Governor Pamela Baric...

item.title: Thousands of Iconic Hollywood Props to Be Auctioned
item.description: At the end of this month, film and television enthusiasts will have the chance to purchase thousands of iconic pieces of Hollywood history through the Propstore auction. The sale will feature memorabi...

item.title: Pakistan raises concerns at UN over cross-border terrorism from Afghanistan
item.description: At a recent UN Security Council meeting on Afghanistan, Pakistan’s Permanent Representative, Ambassador Asim Iftikhar Ahmad, highlighted that terrorism originating from Afghan soil poses a serious thr...

item.title: Guidelines for Transparent and Responsible Privatisation of Public Enterprises
item.description: The editorial discusses the proposed privatisation of certain sections of Mombasa Port and three berths of Lamu Port, highlighting that such moves should be strategic and transparent. It stresses that...

item.title: Kuwait holds funeral for two interior ministry officials killed amid regional conflict
item.description: Kuwait held a solemn military funeral on Monday for two interior ministry officials, Lieutenant Colonel Staff Abdullah Emad Al-Sharrah and Major Fahad Abdulaziz Al-Mejmed, who were killed while perfor...

item.title: Charo Santos highlights importance of respect for women during Women’s Month
item.description: In celebration of Women’s Month, Charo Santos, a prominent figure in Philippine media and entertainment, emphasized the enduring importance of respecting women. Speaking to the public, Santos reminded...

item.title: Rahul Gandhi criticises PM Modi over economic impact of West Asia conflict
item.description: Congress leader Rahul Gandhi on Monday criticised Prime Minister Narendra Modi for not addressing the economic consequences of the ongoing West Asia conflict. Gandhi alleged that the PM was being blac...

item.title: Minibus driver obtains protection order against matric pupil following repeated incidents
item.description: A minibus driver from Roodepoort, who was involved in a widely shared viral video showing a pupil being slapped and dragged from his vehicle, has applied for a protection order against the matric lear...

item.title: Trump voices dissatisfaction with Iran's new Supreme Leader amid French naval deployment
item.description: US President Donald Trump expressed unhappiness with Iran's selection of Mojtaba Khamenei as its new Supreme Leader following the death of his father, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. In a Fox News interview, ...

item.title: How US Oil Production Reduces Vulnerability to Global Price Shocks
item.description: The global conflict involving Iran has driven oil prices higher due to disruptions in Middle Eastern production and transport, as well as interruptions in liquefied natural gas (LNG) flows from Qatar....

item.title: RAAF E-7A Wedgetail Aircraft Information Currently Unavailable
item.description: The E-7A Wedgetail aircraft, operated by the Royal Australian Air Force (RAAF), is currently the focus of attention, although detailed information about it is temporarily unavailable. The Age website ...

item.title: Profiles of Candidates for Antipolo 2nd District Special Election 2026
item.description: Voters in Antipolo’s 2nd District will elect a new congressman on March 14, 2026, in a special election to fill the seat left vacant by the late Romeo Acop. Six candidates are contesting for the posit...

item.title: Philippine President Marcos maintains stance against rejoining ICC
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. remains firm on not rejoining the International Criminal Court (ICC), despite calls from several opposition lawmakers for the Philippines to return to the international ...

item.title: Rajasthan removes two-child restriction for panchayat elections after three decades
item.description: The Rajasthan Legislative Assembly on March 10, 2026, passed the Rajasthan Panchayati Raj (Amendment) Bill, 2026, abolishing the two-child norm that disqualified candidates with more than two children...
